productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Blue Printed Top
description: Composition Blue boat neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has pink criss cross stitch detailing from the neckline on the chest, long sleeves and graphic print across the chest Fit Regular Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron; Do not iron on decorations Subtle and stylish, this blue t-shirt from united colors of benetton speaks volumes of your sense of heightened style. The graphic print adds an edge to this tee, while the cotton fabric keeps you comfortable all day. Team this with jeans and sports shoes for that cool, casual look this winter. Model statistics Product is a size L on a model of height 5'8” and chest 33”
